summary: Wire 9 of the 10 TOQAR core events into the reply_to_lead loop (feedback_given is excluded: the fixture has no user-feedback seam, and an event with no real emission site does not ship). Makes the three intake questions answerable: autonomy rate, cost per sent reply, and reviewer edit magnitude.

added.description: A reply_to_lead task begins when the agent picks up a lead.
added.hypothesis: Baseline volume denominator for all three intake questions.
added.implementation_notes: Emit at the top of replyToLead; task_id from leadId, run_id generated per invocation; lead content only as input_ref (lead id), never the lead fields.

added.description: Each step of the run: CRM lookup (tool_call), draft generation (llm_call), email send (tool_call).
added.hypothesis: Cost per sent reply (Q2) needs tokens/latency per llm_call; tool failures explain failed tasks.
added.implementation_notes: tool_name crm_lookup / email_send; model and token usage from the messages.create response; status error on thrown exceptions.

added.description: Reply sent. Provider ack (messageId) upgrades verification to verified.
added.hypothesis: Q2 cost per sent reply: cost_usd summed across the run divided by completions.
added.implementation_notes: verification=verified, verifier=email_provider_ack; duration from startedAt; output only as output_ref (messageId).

added.description: Empty draft or a thrown error (CRM miss, API failure) fails the task.
added.hypothesis: Failure share and error taxonomy for the success-rate denominator.
added.implementation_notes: error.type from the caught error class (e.g. crm_lookup_failed, empty_draft); retryable=true for transient API errors.

added.description: Reviewer declines the draft; the task is walked away from.
added.hypothesis: Distinguishes reviewer rejection from technical failure in the denominator.

added.description: Draft goes to the reviewer for approval before sending.
added.hypothesis: Q1: share of replies sent with zero human touch — this event is the numerator's complement.
added.implementation_notes: reason=approval_required, blocking=true; draft travels as context_ref, never inline.

added.hypothesis: response_latency_ms distribution shows where review is the bottleneck.
added.implementation_notes: response_latency_ms from respondedInMs; emit in the approval callback.

added.description: Reviewer changed the draft before approving (edited=true, finalText differs).
added.hypothesis: Q3: how often and how much the reviewer rewrites drafts.
added.implementation_notes: artifact_type=email_draft; edit_magnitude in chars = diff(draft, finalText); texts themselves never captured.

added.description: Reviewer discards the agent draft entirely and writes their own (approved=false path when they take over).
added.hypothesis: Trust indicator: overrides falling over time is the PMF signal.
added.implementation_notes: Emit alongside task_abandoned when the reviewer replaces rather than declines; reason free-text enum from the approval UI.
